reviews.comment:
En este caso fui por Hielos. Siempre tienen. Ademas, con el metrobus de cabildo, adaptaron la vereda para que las largas filas no corten el transito y a priori quedó bastante bien. Se puede hacer la Licencia Internacional con bastante rapidez.

(Translated by Google)
In this case, I went for ice cream. They always have it. Also, with the Cabildo Metrobus, they adapted the sidewalk so that long lines don't block traffic, and it seems to have turned out quite well. You can get an International Driving Permit fairly quickly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnOWN6TWp3RRAB
